description_long: This is a set of three rectangular storage cabinets or shelves, each with a simple, modern design. The cabinets feature a combination of open shelving and closed compartments, with the leftmost unit having a solid door and three open shelves, while the other two units have three open shelves each and no visible doors. The surfaces are finished in a wood-like veneer, with the leftmost cabinet in a light gray color and the other two in a warm, natural wood tone. Each cabinet has a small, vertical metallic handle on the door or panel, adding a functional accent. The backs and sides are plain, with no additional features or decorations. These cabinets are suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas, providing both storage and display space.
description: A trio of rectangular cabinets or shelves with wood and gray finishes, featuring open shelving and a single door with metallic handles. The design is modern and functional, ideal for urban storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three cabinets, highlighting the open shelves and the single door with a handle on the leftmost unit.
description_view_1: Side view showing the depth and plain, unadorned sides of the cabinets, with the wood grain visible on the two rightmost units.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, featureless backs of the cabinets, with the color difference between the gray and wood-finished units clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side panels and the transition between gray and wood finishes.
